resources.string: Siz %s unvoniga ega tajribali shaxmat murabbiyimisiz?

string.name: nmOrFideTitle
string.comment:
nmOrFideTitle
Part of sentence "Are you a great chess coach with a NM or FIDE title?"
The text links to our title verification page: https://lichess.org/help/master

resources.string: Unvoningizni bu yerda tasdiqlang va biz arizangizni koʻrib chiqamiz.

string.name: sendApplication
string.comment:
sendApplication
%s is the lichess email address

resources.string: Bizga %s manziliga xat yuboring va biz arizangizni koʻrib chiqamiz.
